summary: One real issue was captured, but the duplicate CTA regression was missed.

findings.title: Applying a no-result ingredient filter leaves stale recipes visible
findings.expected: Applying an empty filter should either disable the CTA or show an empty result state.
findings.actual: The stale recipe list remains visible after applying a no-result ingredient filter.
repro_steps: Open the ingredient filter on mobile-ios-small.
Search for a non-existent ingredient and tap apply.

remainingRisks: The detail surface was not fully re-checked for duplicate share actions.

linked_findings: Applying a no-result ingredient filter leaves stale recipes visible
Applying a no-result ingredient filter leaves stale recipes visible

checklistCoverage.notes: Looked at the detail surface but did not record a duplicate CTA issue.
